data.title: Tesla Model Q Priced Below $30,000 After Subsidies To Reportedly Launch In First Half Of 2025
data.description: Tesla will reportedly launch a new vehicle called Model Q in the first half of next year, priced below $30,000 after subsidies.

data.title: Dogecoin Grinds Higher But 'Lower Prices Are To Be Expected,' Warns Technical Analyst
data.description: Dogecoin's (CRYPTO: DOGE) strong gains in November point to overall bullish sentiment, but traders expect a pullback in the near term.

data.title: Bitcoin Miner MARA Holdings Raises $850M In 0% Convertible Notes, Offering A 40% Premium Over Current Share Price
data.description: Bitcoin miner MARA Holdings Inc (NASDAQ:MARA) recently completed its $850 million offering of 0% convertible senior notes due 2031.

data.title: SafeWise Study Reveals 120.5 Million Packages Are Stolen From Porches Each Year. Here's How Americans Are Advised To Deal With This Issue
Is Tesla Bringing Back Its Media Team? New Job Listing Suggests So, Years After Elon Musk Said Other Companies Spend Money On 'Manipulating Public Opinion'
data.description: Tesla is looking to hire a vehicle communications manager at its factory in Fremont, California, in a possible move towards restoring a media team.
